title: Curver My Style Clothes Basket, Stylish Rattan Look, Lightweight Plastic Design, 47 Litres, Cream
features: Stylish rattan-effect design - blends seamlessly into any bedroom, bathroom, or laundry space
Spacious 47-litre capacity - ideal for storing clothes, towels, or linen
Durable plastic construction - lightweight, sturdy, and easy to carry
Ventilated sides - promotes airflow to reduce moisture and odours
Neutral cream colour - complements modern and traditional interiors alike
description: From the manufacturer My Style Laundry Basket 55L Bring style and practicality into your home with this elegant 55L storage hamper, available in Grey and Vintage White. Designed with a traditional flat rattan effect, it adds a timeless touch while the open weave style ensures natural ventilation to keep odours to a minimum. Perfect for bathrooms, bedrooms or utility areas, this hamper combines beauty with everyday functionality. Made from durable yet lightweight resin, it is easy to clean and built to last, while the integrated handles make carrying simple and comfortable. With generous dimensions of 43 x 33 x 60 cm, it offers ample storage without taking up unnecessary space. Proudly made in the UK and Europe, this versatile hamper is the ideal solution for stylish and hygienic laundry storage.
